findings.content: Current Add-to-Cart rate for Weekly Basket Builders is 11.3% (UAE) and 14.1% (KW). Cart abandonment at substitution step is 23% of all abandonments.
findings.source: Analytics dashboard — last 90 days, filtered by persona segment

findings.content: Delivery slot selection accounts for only 8% of cart abandonments — lower than assumed. The bigger drop-off is at the payment step (34%).
findings.source: Funnel analysis — grocery checkout flow, last 60 days

self_review.self_check_notes: Data sources are within 90 days. Segmentation matches persona definitions. Counter-signals given equal weight.
self_review.review_feedback: Data sources are recent and properly segmented. Counter-signal on delivery slots is significant and well-evidenced.
